arcs.title: The Northern Descent
arcs.summary: The Ordnance Office has confirmed that 'Unverified (Seasonal)' refers to the terrain itself, not the measurement — the northern descent has only been surveyed once, in February, by a surveyor whose notes end mid-sentence. Steve has the February notes and has not disclosed how far he's read. Christine hasn't asked. The brass ducks have been observed but have not clarified matters. Day 3 should bring the February notes into the open — either Steve reveals what the mid-sentence point says, or Christine finds the notes and reads ahead. The question of whether the descent is a 'route' in any practical sense should begin to sharpen.
